Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rosephus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Rosephus is a Champion who is muscled like an Izyrian statue and carries many weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Rosephus carries three swords buckled to the right side of his hip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Rosephus is a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Rosephus is a Champion whose Vessel allows him to create spectral weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Rosephus's Soulbound Vessel creates daggers of red light that float over his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Rosephus's Soulbound Vessel is described as a blue Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Rosephus possesses a sword that he spins in place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Rosephus uses red daggers that hover over him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Tyria called out to Rosephus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Rosephus carries the Emperor's full-face helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Rosephus has a shallow cut over one eyebrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Rosephus asks who among the group are Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Rosephus is someone Petal commands to seal a door.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Rosephus was destroying walls in a rage to find someone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Rosephus uses a sword in each hand and has three ghostly red daggers as his Soulbound power.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
